insight_tenant_id.title: Tenant ID
insight_tenant_id.description: Unique tenant identifier for multi-tenant data isolation.

insight_source_id.title: Source ID
insight_source_id.description: Stable identifier for this connector instance (e.g., bitbucket-cloud-acme-prod).

bitbucket_email.title: Bitbucket Email
bitbucket_email.description: Bitbucket account email address used for API token authentication.

bitbucket_token.title: API Token
bitbucket_token.description: Bitbucket Cloud API token with scopes (Repository: Read, Pull requests: Read). Created at Settings > API tokens.

bitbucket_workspaces.title: Workspaces
bitbucket_workspaces.description: List of Bitbucket workspace slugs to collect data from.

bitbucket_start_date.title: Start Date
bitbucket_start_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Limits first full run to commits on or after this date. Leave empty for no limit.
